Cirrus SR20 G2 - G-CHPG - 1/4 share, Dunkeswell

Aircraft Type: Single Engine Fixed Wing
Year: 2006
Make: Cirrus Design Corporation
Model: SR20 G2
Reg Number: G-CHPG
Airframe Hours: 1119
Engine Make: Continental IO-360-ES
Engine Hours: 96 SMOH (overhauled 2022)
Prop Make: Hartzell CS
Prop Hours: 96
Prop Overhaul: 2022
ARC: Valid to March 2026
Annual: Completed March 2024

Price: £30,000 (1/4 share, total aircraft value ~£120,000)

Avionics:
- Avidyne Entegra glass cockpit (dual 10.3" displays, PFD + MFD)
- Avidyne IFD440 NAV/COM/GPS x2
- S-TEC 55X two-axis autopilot with altitude hold
- Avidyne AXP340 ADS-B Out (1090ES Mode S ES)
Full IFR panel: AHRS, ADC, HSI, altimeter, VSI, TC.

UK CofA. Type Certificated. IFR approved aircraft.

Based at Dunkeswell Aerodrome (EGTU). 1/4 share in group of 4 owners. Monthly costs approx £250/month including hangar, insurance, maintenance reserve.

CAPS ballistic parachute system. Heated pitot.

Notes: Well-maintained SR20 in a friendly 4-way syndicate. Avidyne Entegra glass cockpit and S-TEC 55X autopilot make it a capable IFR cross-country aircraft. Engine recently overhauled. ADS-B Out compliant.

Contact: 07800 123456
